data.title: skills: invalid dso: subagent_type values in update-docs, brainstorm, resolve-conflicts, preplanning, plan-review SKILL.md files
data.description: Same anti-pattern as a541-0ad7 (REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md): these skill files use subagent_type: "dso:*" which is not a valid Agent tool type. Files: plugins/dso/skills/update-docs/SKILL.md:71, plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md:583,587, plugins/dso/skills/resolve-conflicts/SKILL.md:77, plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md:251,267,776, plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md:79, plugins/dso/skills/plan-review/SKILL.md:48. Fix: replace with general-purpose + inline agent file content pattern per CLAUDE.md.
